actionUnits.condition: Scene MonoBehaviour_0 (id 2013310826) on platform2 (2) uses script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77, which matches AttachToElevator. BoxCollider (id 2013310828) is present but IsTrigger=0. To exercise AttachToElevator.OnTriggerEnter, set BoxCollider.IsTrigger=1 and assign MonoBehaviour_0.player to the Player GameObject (with Rigidbody+Collider). Then have Player enter platform2 (2)'s trigger volume. Expected behavior per code: if (gameObject == player) then player.transform.SetParent(gameObject.transform, true). Note: the current comparison uses 'gameObject == player', so it will only pass if 'player' references platform2 (2) itself; otherwise no parenting will occur.

With the same setup as above (IsTrigger=1, player field assigned, Player with Rigidbody+Collider), have Player exit platform2 (2)'s trigger volume to exercise AttachToElevator.OnTriggerExit (MonoBehaviour id 2013310826, script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77). Expected behavior per code: if (gameObject == player) then player.transform.parent = null.
